reasoning.meeting-ingestion-skill: KEEP - This is the current canonical system (v2.0) for unified meeting transcript processing. It supersedes all legacy MG-1 through MG-6 agent sequences and provides the pull → stage → process → archive pipeline. Status: COMPLETE.
reasoning.MG-2: ARCHIVE - Legacy meeting intelligence system that has been superseded by the meeting-ingestion skill. Contains old per-meeting builds and is no longer the active system. The meeting-ingestion skill now provides the canonical flow.

reasoning.unified-meeting-intake: ARCHIVE - System development build that was an intermediate step toward the meeting-ingestion skill. The PLAN.md describes creating a unified intake kernel, but the meeting-ingestion skill now provides this functionality. Superseded by meeting-ingestion-skill (v2.0).

meta.methodology: Analyzed each build's PLAN.md to understand purpose, checked for active references, compared against meeting-ingestion skill capabilities, assessed whether build is system development (now in skill) or per-meeting output.
